productDisplayName: Mother Earth Women Black Printed Top
description: Composition Black and beige printed top made of blended cotton fabric, has a mandarin collar with a deep V-neckline and a full buttoned placket, ruffle detail on the yoke, three quarter sleeves and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleed Flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron The inspiration for this top from mother earth is the retro-esque fusion of the ethnic with smart workwear. This piece epitomizes how fashion, vintage styling and comfort unite to create the perfect Indian tunic. Mother Earth uses hand processed fabrics including natural and Azo free dyes. Woven with slub yarns for an authentic vintage feel. Those interested in colour blocking can wear this with bright contrasting capris or pants. Others, who want to keep their look classic and chic, can pair this with denims and embellished slippers. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
